commentary: FY 2025: price/sales 3.0953, operating profit 0.86B, normalized NI proxy 0.3B.
Normalized net income proxy growth is 214.32% YoY, trend improving.
Normalized P/E proxy is 46.75x based on current market cap.
5Y market-cap payback ratio is 14.07% using 3Y geometric revenue growth.
commentaryZh: FY 2025：市销率 3.0953，营业利润 0.86B，扣非净利润代理值 0.3B。
扣非净利润代理值同比增速为 214.32%，趋势改善。
近 3 年营收几何增速为 9.29%。
基于当前市值得到的扣非净利润市盈率代理值为 46.75 倍。
按 3 年营收几何增速投射，未来 5 年市值回收率为 14.07%。
methodology: Fee-adjusted net income proxy = net income - stock-based compensation expense.
Normalized net income proxy = fee-adjusted net income proxy - absolute special items.
5Y market-cap payback ratio = projected next 5 years normalized NI proxy sum / current market cap.
Projection growth uses 3Y geometric revenue growth.
methodologyZh: 扣费净利润代理值 = 净利润 - 股权激励费用。
扣非净利润代理值 = 扣费净利润代理值 - 特殊项目绝对值。
5 年市值回收率 = 未来 5 年扣非净利润代理值预测总和 / 当前市值。
增长投射默认使用 3 年营收几何增速。
